output.sparql:
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
SELECT ?debutClub WHERE {
  wd:Q323222 wdt:P155 ?season .
  ?season wdt:P585 ?date .
  FILTER(YEAR(?date) = 2008)
  .
  ?player p:P1652 [ ps:P1652 ?goals ; pq:P4635 ?season ] .
  ?player p:P54 [ ps:P54 ?club ; pq:P4635 ?season ] .
  ?club wdt:P131 wd:Q277031 .
  ?player wdt:P1195 ?debutClub .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?goals)
LIMIT 1
